name: Elemental Evil Player's Companion
summary: A winged people who originated on the Elemental Plane of Air, aarakocra soar through the sky wherever they wander. The first aarakocra served the Wind Dukes of Aaqa — mighty beings of air — and were imbued with a measure of their masters’ power over winds. Their descendants still command echoes of that power.
bonuses: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse
Source: Mordenkainen Presents: Monsters of the Multiverse

Ability Score Increase.When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

traits.name: Flight
traits.summary: Because of your wings, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can’t use this flying speed if you’re wearing medium or heavy armor.

traits.name: Talons
traits.summary: You have talons that you can use to make unarmed strikes. When you hit with them, the strike deals 1d6 + your Strength modifier slashing damage, instead of the bludgeoning damage normal for an unarmed strike.

traits.name: Wind Caller
traits.summary: Starting at 3rd level, you can cast theGust of Windspell with this trait, without requiring a material component. Once you cast the spell with this trait, you can’t do so again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of 2nd level or higher. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it when you castGust of Windwith this trait (choose when you select this race).

traits.name: Age
traits.summary: Aarakocra reach maturity by age 3. Compared to humans, aarakocra don’t usually live longer than 30 years.

traits.name: Alignment
traits.summary: Most aarakocra are good and rarely choose sides when it comes to law and chaos. Tribal leaders and warriors might be lawful, while explorers and adventurers might tend toward chaotic.

traits.name: Flight
traits.summary: You have a flying speed of 50 feet. To use this speed, you can’t be wearing medium or heavy armor.

traits.name: Talons
traits.summary: You are proficient with your unarmed strikes, which deal 1d4 slashing damage on a hit.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.
